title: Grassy Adventurous Argentinian Gruyre Asado
description: This traditional Argentinian grilled asado features a rich and creamy gruyre cheese, paired with smoky grilled vegetables and a tangy chimichurri sauce.
instructions: Season wagyu beef strips with salt, pepper, and paprika.
Grill beef strips for 5-7 minutes per side, or until medium-rare.
Transfer beef to a plate and let rest for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, grill sliced onions, bell peppers, and zucchini for 5-7 minutes, or until tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, red wine vinegar, garlic, oregano, and red pepper flakes for the chimichurri sauce.
Brush chimichurri sauce on grilled vegetables.
Shred gruyre cheese and sprinkle on top of beef and vegetables.
